sample_requests: Convert the OmicVerse t_metabol_01_intro notebook into a reusable preprocessing skill
Load a MetaboAnalyst CSV, impute with QRILC, PQN-normalize, log-transform, and run a Welch t-test for cachexic vs control
Apply drift_correct + SERRF + ComBat to an LC-MS run with QC pools and 3 batches
Run sample_qc on a corrected metabolomics AnnData and list outliers above the 0.95 critical Hotelling line
Choose the right impute method for left-censored LC-MS missingness vs. random NMR missingness
Use the pyMetabo chainable API to run impute → normalize → log → differential → pareto in one call

validation_budget.skip_reason: Skill is preprocessing-only and has no live smoke harness yet; source-grounding is established by inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc / direct source reads of omicverse.metabol and omicverse.bulk.batch_correction.
